heading: Continuation coverage premium assistance
label: 139I Continuation coverage premium assistance
text: In the case of an assistance eligible individual (as defined in subsection (a)(3) of section 9501 of the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021), gross income does not include any premium assistance provided under subsection (a)(1) of such section.
notes: References in TextSection 9501 of the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021, referred to in text, is , which is set out as a note under .section 9501 of Pub. L. 117–2section 4980B of this title
